texto: There's no seduction any more, diary. No subtlety. No tidy-yourself-up in this world. No need for personal pride. There's just the things you're prepared to do - for survival, for fulfillment, for whatever-the-hell-it-is you really need - and the things you're not.
explicacao: Citação de Simon Spurrier sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “There's no seduction any more, diary. No subtlety. No tidy-yourself-up in this world. No need for…” articula motivacao, defeatism, life-goals em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como life-goals e simplicity.
